Issue: Image missing alt attribute:
Recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute or alt="" if decorative.

Issue: Icon-only buttons lack accessible labels (no aria-label or visually-hidden text).
Recommendation: Add aria-label to each icon button describing its action.

Issue: Duplicate id="card-item" when Card is rendered in a list; violates DOM uniqueness and breaks aria-labelledby/describedby references.
Recommendation: Use a unique id per instance (e.g. pass an id prop or generate with useId).

Issue: Clickable div with onClick has no keyboard support (no role="button", no tabIndex, no onKeyDown).
Recommendation: Use a <button> element or add role="button" tabIndex={0} and keyboard event handlers.

Issue: Mapped items rendered without a key prop; may cause screen-reader re-announce issues on re-render.
Recommendation: Add a stable unique key to each mapped element.

Issue: Image in section lacks explicit width/height; may shift layout for assistive tech users.
Recommendation: Add width and height attributes or use CSS aspect-ratio.

Issue: Page title "Sample Page" is generic and non-descriptive; search engines rely on title for ranking.
Recommendation: Use a specific descriptive title with target keywords (50-60 chars).

Issue: No <meta name=""description""> tag; search results will show auto-generated snippets.
Recommendation: Add a unique meta description (120-160 chars) summarizing the page.

Issue: No JSON-LD or structured data markup; limits rich-result eligibility.
Recommendation: Add appropriate Schema.org JSON-LD (e.g. WebPage or Organization).

Issue: No <link rel=""canonical""> tag; risks duplicate-content indexing issues.
Recommendation: Add a canonical link element pointing to the preferred URL.

Issue: No og: or twitter: meta tags; links shared on social media will lack rich previews.
Recommendation: Add Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags.

Issue: Synchronous external stylesheet in <head> blocks first paint.
Recommendation: Use media=""print"" onload hack or load CSS asynchronously; inline critical CSS.

Issue: @font-face missing font-display: swap; causes invisible text during font load (FOIT).
Recommendation: Add font-display: swap to the @font-face rule.

Issue: Image missing width and height attributes causes layout shift when loaded.
Recommendation: Add explicit width and height attributes to .

Issue: Reading offsetHeight then writing style.minHeight in same frame forces synchronous reflow.
Recommendation: Batch reads and writes or use requestAnimationFrame to separate them.

Issue: Dynamic content inserted via setTimeout without size reservation shifts layout.
Recommendation: Reserve space with min-height or CSS containment before content loads.

Issue: Below-fold image lacks loading="lazy"; browser will eagerly fetch it.
Recommendation: Add loading="lazy" to images below the initial viewport.

Issue: console.log left in production code; adds unnecessary I/O and can leak data.
Recommendation: Remove or guard with a debug flag / environment check.

Issue: innerHTML used with unsanitized user input from location.hash; enables reflected XSS.
Recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML or sanitize input with DOMPurify.

Issue: document.querySelector used inside a React component instead of refs; fragile and can select unintended elements.
Recommendation: Use React useRef to reference elements within the component tree.
